ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "parent_metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent metric type (for sub-types) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU user time, memory usage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., seconds, bytes) */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric (e.g., integer, float) */,
  "is_aggregated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is aggregated */,
  "aggregation_function" TEXT /* Function used for aggregation (e.g., sum, average) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was collected */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean absolute error (MAE) of the metric */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root mean squared error (RMSE) of the metric */,
  "mape" REAL /* Mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) of the metric */,
  "smape" REAL /* Symmetric mean absolute percentage error (SMAPE) of the metric */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source from which the metric is collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., server, virtual machine, container) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., server, virtual machine, container) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source (e.g., data center, cloud provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric collection */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source from which the metric is collected */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of metric collection (e.g., every 1 minute, every 5 minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_collections_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_collections_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, developer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Read access for the user on the metric */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Write access for the user on the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being monitored */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "comparison_operator" TEXT /* Comparison operator for the alert (e.g., greater than, less than) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification for the alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)
